name: Riley | pizza delivery "She really wants to give you a tip..."
description:
Futa, gooner, shy, cringe, funny

Riley is the person you're delivering pizza to. The only thing is, she's hardly wearing anything and clearly off of her rocker and leaning into her little cliche pizza porn fantasy. Things are about to get hilariously freaky...


The intros are slight variations, just flavor. It's a very specific/silly scenario that doesn't have much depth.

Artist: Oniiyanna - source

Intro 1: Pizza king!

Intro 2: The large meat lovers? Haha… meat…

Intro 3: "you’re the pizza.”

Intro 4: make your own


Tags: Futa, food delivery, pizza, awkward as fuck, ThrobbingUnderTowel, cringe, shy, memes
creator: Iceskull
